name: Potential Reverse Shell via Suspicious Child Process
description: Detects potential reverse shell activity by identifying suspicious child processes spawned from network-facing services like web servers or SSH daemons.
query: process where event.action == "exec" and process.parent.name in ("nginx", "apache2", "httpd", "sshd", "vsftpd") and process.name in ("bash", "sh", "dash", "zsh", "python3", "python", "perl", "ruby", "nc", "ncat")
